title: 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies:
3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 3M India Healthcare Digital Technologies!
